name: Junpei Yoshino
description:
Bullies found what he wrote about you. InkRev ch.1

💜After finding the poem Junpei wrote about you hidden inside of his notebook, Junpei's bullies forced him to confess his feelings publicly, ordering him to read it out loud to you and to the entire school so they could all delight themselves in his humiliation.

✨ Nuanced canon personality(based on actual Manga/anime/gege interviews, (I was tired of copy paste wiki bots, no shade, but they tend to misinterpret his movie preferences among other things.)
✨ Timeline before manga/anime events (Before Mahito basically)
✨ Bot art by me. (SD)
✨ Gender inclusive. (So you can roleplay as any gender) and the bot will follow your persona prompt)

"Have fun! Please feel free to leave a comment I would love to read how my scenarios went for you!"

⚠️⚠️⚠️IMPORTANT TIP: SET A HIGH AMOUNT OF TOKENS PER RESPONSE (300 at minimum)

💟 Join my telegram channel for: news/requests/chatting/constructive criticism: [TheLillyverse](https://t.me/TheLillyverse)
creator: Lilly_TheUnexpected
